meta.title: Awesome Egocentric Atlas
meta.description: Awesome Egocentric Atlas: curated egocentric AI datasets, benchmarks, models, and tools

status_legend.open: Public download, public annotations, public code, or application-based access is clearly documented.
status_legend.request: Public project exists, but dataset access requires license, form, approval, or institutional agreement.
status_legend.benchmark: Mainly a benchmark, challenge, labels, or evaluation over existing videos.
status_legend.partial: Some assets are public, but full raw data, license, or long-term availability is unclear.
status_legend.watch: Recent or important resource whose release state still needs verification.

lanes.label: Foundation Video
lanes.description: large-scale ego video, representation learning, and video-language pretraining

lanes.label: Procedure and Action
lanes.description: actions, procedures, anticipation, mistakes, and skill assessment

lanes.label: Hands, Objects, and 3D
lanes.description: hands, contact, pose, tracking, segmentation, and scene geometry

lanes.label: Memory and Reasoning
lanes.description: long-context QA, episodic memory, grounding, planning, and intent

lanes.label: Robotics and VLA
lanes.description: human-to-robot transfer, manipulation, imitation, and VLA data

lanes.label: AR and Wearables
lanes.description: AR glasses, wearable sensors, audio, social interaction, and assistants

resources.name: Xperience-10M
resources.scale: 10M experiences, 10K hours, six video streams, audio, stereo depth, camera pose, hand/body mocap, IMU, hierarchical language, about 1 PB total

resources.name: Xperience-10M Sample
resources.scale: Public sample episode; Hugging Face viewer reports 6 rows

resources.name: Ego4D
resources.scale: 3,670+ hours, 900+ camera wearers, 74 locations, 9 countries

resources.name: Ego-Exo4D
resources.scale: 1,286 hours, 740 participants, synchronized ego/exo views

resources.name: EPIC-KITCHENS-100
resources.scale: 100 hours, 20M frames, 90K action segments, 45 kitchens

resources.name: HD-EPIC
resources.scale: 41 hours, 9 kitchens, 59K fine-grained actions, 26K VQA questions

resources.name: HoloAssist
resources.scale: 166 hours, 350 instructor-performer pairs

resources.name: Assembly101
resources.scale: 4,321 videos, 8 static plus 4 egocentric views, 1M fine-grained action segments

resources.name: Ego-1K
resources.scale: Nearly 1,000 synchronized multiview egocentric videos

resources.name: EgoObjects
resources.scale: 9K+ videos, 650K annotations, 368 categories in pilot release

resources.name: EgoBlind
resources.scale: 1,392 first-person videos from blind and visually impaired users; 5,311 questions

resources.name: EgoDex
resources.scale: 829 hours, 194 tabletop tasks, Apple Vision Pro capture

resources.name: EgoVerse
resources.scale: 1,362 hours, 80K episodes, 1,965 tasks, 2,087 demonstrators

resources.name: OpenEgo
resources.scale: 1,107 hours across six public datasets, 290 manipulation tasks

resources.name: Open X-Embodiment / RT-X
resources.scale: 1M+ real robot trajectories, 22 robot embodiments, 60 pooled robot datasets (robot-mounted and wrist cameras, not human first-person)

resources.name: EgoLive
resources.scale: Large-scale real-world task-oriented egocentric routines

resources.name: World In Your Hands
resources.scale: Reported 1,000+ hours of multimodal human-centric manipulation data

resources.name: InterVLA
resources.scale: 11.4 hours, 1.2M frames, 2 egocentric and 5 exocentric videos

resources.name: EgoPAT3D / EgoPAT3Dv2
resources.scale: Original EgoPAT3D reports 1M+ RGB-D and IMU frames; v2 expands 3D action-target prediction

resources.name: HOT3D
resources.scale: 833+ minutes, 3.7M+ images, 19 subjects, 33 objects

resources.name: HOI4D
resources.scale: 2.4M RGB-D egocentric frames, 4,000+ sequences, 800 objects

resources.name: ARCTIC
resources.scale: 2.1M frames

resources.name: EgoHands
resources.scale: 48 Google Glass videos, 4,800 annotated images

resources.name: FPHA
resources.scale: 100K+ RGB-D frames, 45 action classes, 26 objects

resources.name: EgoHOS
resources.scale: 11,243 egocentric images

resources.name: EgoHumans
resources.scale: 125K+ egocentric images

resources.name: Aria Digital Twin
resources.scale: 200 sequences, 398 object instances

resources.name: Aria Everyday Activities
resources.scale: 143 daily activity sequences across five indoor locations

resources.name: Nymeria
resources.scale: 300 hours, 264 participants, 50 locations

resources.name: Digital Twin Catalog
resources.scale: 2,000 scanned digital-twin objects

resources.name: EgoLife
resources.scale: 300 hours, 6 participants, one week daily life

resources.name: Ego-EXTRA
resources.scale: 50 hours, 15K+ VQA pairs

resources.name: EgoSchema
resources.scale: 5K+ multiple-choice QA pairs, 250+ hours

resources.name: X-LeBench
resources.scale: 432 simulated life logs, 23 minutes to 16.4 hours

resources.name: TeleEgo
resources.scale: 3,291 human-verified QA items in streaming setting

resources.name: EgoMemReason
resources.scale: 500 questions across entity, event, and behavior memory; average 25.9 hours of memory backtracking

resources.name: EgoClip
resources.scale: 3.8M clip-text pairs

resources.name: RefEgo
resources.scale: 12K+ clips and 41 hours for video-based referring-expression comprehension

resources.name: EgoBench
resources.scale: 1,045 egocentric-video-grounded interactive tasks

resources.name: EgoIntrospect
resources.scale: 180 hours, 60 subjects

resources.name: Minerva-Ego
resources.scale: Part of the Neptune / MINERVA long-video reasoning collection over web (YouTube) videos with manually annotated reasoning traces

resources.name: MA-EgoQA
resources.scale: 1.7K questions over multiple egocentric streams

resources.name: MyEgo
resources.scale: 541 long videos, 5K personalized questions

resources.name: EgoSound
resources.scale: 7,315 validated QA pairs across 900 videos

resources.name: EgoEsportsQA
resources.scale: 1,745 QA pairs from professional matches across three first-person shooter games

resources.name: Causal-Plan-1M
resources.scale: Million-scale explicit reasoning traces over egocentric videos

resources.name: AssistQ
resources.scale: 531 QA samples from 100 instructional videos

resources.name: HowToDIV
resources.scale: 507 conversations, 6,636 QA pairs, 24 hours

resources.name: EgoCoT-Bench
resources.scale: 3,172 QA pairs over 351 egocentric videos

resources.name: NoRA
resources.scale: 1,420 first-person video clips

resources.name: Ego-R1
resources.scale: Ego-CoTT-25K, Ego-QA-4.4K, and Ego-R1 Bench

resources.name: EgoTrigger / HME-QA
resources.scale: 340 human-annotated first-person QA pairs from full-length Ego4D videos curated for audio

resources.name: Charades-Ego
resources.scale: 68.8 hours, 68,536 activity instances

resources.name: EgoProceL
resources.scale: 62 hours, 130 subjects, 16 tasks

resources.name: EGO-CH
resources.scale: 27+ hours, 70 subjects, 2 cultural sites, 26 environments, 200+ points of interest

resources.name: EgoExoLearn
resources.scale: 120 hours

resources.name: KrishnaCam / OAK
resources.scale: OAK: 80 snippets, about 17.5 hours, 105 object categories from KrishnaCam

resources.name: EgoTraj
resources.scale: 75 Meta Quest Pro navigation sequences

resources.name: Ropedia Xperience-10M Task Suite
resources.scale: 12 embodied-AI task contracts over one public Xperience-10M sample episode

resources.name: Ropedia Xperience-10M Task Baselines
resources.scale: Public task definitions, baseline artifacts, metrics, and scale-up notes for Xperience-10M

resources.name: EgoCom / Ego audio-visual correspondence
resources.scale: Egocentric video with spatial audio for conversation and audio-visual correspondence tasks

resources.name: EasyCom
resources.scale: AR glasses egocentric multi-channel audio and wide-FOV RGB for noisy conversations

resources.name: Look and Tell
resources.scale: 25 participants, Project Aria plus stationary cameras, gaze/speech/video, 3D reconstructions

resources.name: EgoVLA
resources.scale: VLA training from egocentric human videos plus robot fine-tuning

resources.name: EgoEngine
resources.scale: Framework converting egocentric human manipulation video into robot observation/action data

resources.name: EgoAERO
resources.scale: Asset-free conversion from a single egocentric RGB-D demonstration; introduces EgoDex-R in the paper

resources.name: HRDexDB
resources.scale: 1.4K human/robot grasping trials, tactile, multiview video, egocentric video streams

resources.name: UnrealEgo2 / UnrealEgo-RW
resources.scale: Expanded stereo egocentric pose datasets from synthetic and real-world capture

resources.name: TouchMoment
resources.scale: 4,021 egocentric videos, 8,456 annotated hand-object contact moments

resources.name: EgoFun3D
resources.scale: 271 egocentric videos with 3D geometry, part segmentation, articulation and function-template annotations

resources.name: EgoEMG
resources.scale: 41 participants, bilateral EMG, IMU, RGB, external RGB-D, mocap hand labels

resources.name: EgoEVHands
resources.scale: Stereo event-camera egocentric hand dataset with 5,419 sequences and 3D/2D keypoints

resources.name: EventEgoHands
resources.scale: Event-based egocentric 3D hand mesh reconstruction benchmark over N-HOT3D

resources.name: A multimodal RGB/events FPV hand dataset
resources.scale: Synthetic event-based first-person hand detection from EgoHands plus v2e

resources.name: EgoExoMem
resources.scale: 2.6K MCQs across synchronized ego-exo videos

resources.name: EgoSelf
resources.scale: Personalized egocentric assistant framework with graph memory

resources.name: EgoCross
resources.scale: About 1,000 QA pairs over surgery, industry, extreme sports, and animal-perspective clips

resources.name: ADL Dataset
resources.scale: Unscripted daily activity recordings with activity/object/hand annotations in classic literature

resources.name: Wrist-mounted ADL
resources.scale: Synchronized head and wrist wearable-camera daily activities

resources.name: Visual Experience Dataset / VEDB
resources.scale: 240+ hours egocentric video with gaze/head tracking in classic literature

resources.name: UT Ego
resources.scale: Long daily egocentric videos in classic summarization work

resources.name: HUJI EgoSeg
resources.scale: Long egocentric videos for temporal segmentation

resources.name: JPL First-Person Interaction
resources.scale: First-person videos of people interacting with a humanoid observer

resources.name: FT-HID
resources.scale: 90K+ RGB-D first- and third-person human interaction samples from 109 subjects

resources.name: LSC-ADL
resources.scale: ADL annotations over lifelogging data generated with clustering plus human review

resources.name: SEED4D
resources.scale: Synthetic ego-exo dynamic 4D generator and autonomous-driving dataset (16.8M images, vehicle inward/outward cameras, LiDAR; WACV 2025)

resources.name: Ego4D Benchmarks
resources.scale: Derived benchmark suite built on Ego4D; tasks: Natural Language Query, Moment Query, episodic memory, state change, long-term anticipation, social/audio, hand-object

resources.name: Ego-Exo4D Benchmarks
resources.scale: Derived benchmark suite built on Ego-Exo4D; tasks: Fine-grained activity, proficiency, cross-view translation, 3D pose, object correspondence

resources.name: EPIC-KITCHENS Challenges
resources.scale: Derived benchmark suite built on EPIC-KITCHENS / EPIC-KITCHENS-100; tasks: Recognition, detection, anticipation, retrieval, domain adaptation

resources.name: HD-EPIC VQA Challenge
resources.scale: Derived benchmark suite built on HD-EPIC; tasks: Recipe, ingredient, nutrition, fine-grained action, 3D perception, object motion, gaze

resources.name: EgoEnv
resources.scale: Environment-aware representation learning from egocentric video

resources.name: EgoMAS
resources.scale: Shared-memory baseline for multi-agent egocentric video QA

resources.name: Ego-Exo representation transfer
resources.scale: Distillation from third-person video using ego-specific latent signals

resources.name: EgoPoseFormer
resources.scale: Transformer baseline for stereo egocentric 3D human pose estimation

resources.name: EgoSTARK
resources.scale: Adapted long-term tracker baseline for EgoTracks

resources.name: EgoHOS model
resources.scale: Context-aware hand-object segmentation and augmentation pipeline

resources.name: AV-CONV
resources.scale: Audio-visual conversational graph prediction from ego/exo conversation

resources.name: EgoAction
resources.scale: CVPR 2026 EPIC-KITCHENS action detection challenge pipeline

resources.name: EgoAdapt
resources.scale: CVPR 2026 HD-EPIC VQA challenge inference-time adaptation pipeline

resources.name: Ego4D CLI and docs
resources.scale: Downloading and working with Ego4D data after license approval.

resources.name: Ego-Exo4D CLI and docs
resources.scale: Downloading synchronized ego-exo data and annotations.

resources.name: VISOR API
resources.scale: Loading dense EPIC-KITCHENS hand/object masks and relations.

resources.name: EgoObjects API
resources.scale: Working with category and instance-level egocentric object labels.

resources.name: HOT3D tooling
resources.scale: Loading HOT3D hand/object/camera pose annotations and models.

resources.name: HOI4D tooling
resources.scale: Loading RGB-D frames, point clouds, object meshes, and pose/segmentation annotations.

resources.name: EgoVid-5M
resources.scale: 5M curated egocentric clips at 1080p with fine-grained kinematic and high-level textual action annotations (NeurIPS 2025)

resources.name: AoE
resources.scale: Always-on egocentric human video collection pipeline and corpus for embodied AI data scaling

resources.name: Seeing Across Views (MV-RoboBench)
resources.scale: MV-RoboBench: 1.7K curated QA items over eight subtasks testing multi-view spatial reasoning of VLMs in robotic manipulation scenes (ICLR 2026)

resources.name: EgoGesture
resources.scale: 24K+ gesture samples, 3M RGB-D frames, 50 subjects, 83 static and dynamic gestures across six indoor/outdoor scenes

resources.name: EgoBrain
resources.scale: Synchronized EEG and egocentric video for human action understanding from minds and eyes

resources.name: MM-Ego
resources.scale: Egocentric multimodal LLM with Memory Pointer Prompting; 7M-sample QA data engine and the EgoMemoria benchmark (629 videos, 7,026 questions)

resources.name: EgoStream
resources.scale: 2,250 questions across seven memory dimensions with Answer Validity Windows, expanded to 8,528 recall-conditioned evaluations over streams up to 45.3 hours

resources.name: EgoMemory
resources.scale: 165,795 user-specific object annotations over 245 videos from 45 participants for memory-augmented personalized retrieval

resources.name: EgoTextVQA
resources.scale: Egocentric scene-text-aware video QA across indoor housekeeping and outdoor driving scenes (CVPR 2025)

resources.name: Gesture-Based Egocentric Video QA
resources.scale: Egocentric video QA grounded in the camera wearer's pointing and deictic gestures

resources.name: EgoVQA
resources.scale: 600+ QA pairs over egocentric videos; an early first-person video question answering benchmark

resources.name: ExAct
resources.scale: Video-language benchmark for expert action analysis and feedback over skilled egocentric/exocentric activity

resources.name: Home Action Genome / HOMAGE
resources.scale: 27 participants, multi-modal synchronized ego and third-person views with 12 sensor types and hierarchical activity/action labels in home settings

resources.name: EgoExo-Fitness
resources.scale: Synchronized ego and exo fitness videos with keypoint verification, execution comments, and action quality scores (ECCV 2024)

resources.name: WEAR
resources.scale: 22 participants, 18 outdoor workout activities, synchronized egocentric video and 3D acceleration across 11 locations (IMWUT 2024)

resources.name: Egocentric HOI Detection
resources.scale: New benchmark and method for detecting hand-object interactions in egocentric video

resources.name: SHOW3D
resources.scale: In-the-wild 3D hand-object interaction dataset captured with a back-mounted multi-camera rig synchronized to a worn VR headset, with multi-view 3D shape/pose annotations and text descriptions

resources.name: EgoTouch / TouchAnything
resources.scale: EgoTouch: 302 manipulation tasks across 4,530 episodes with synchronized egocentric and dual wrist-camera video, bimanual 3D hand pose (42 joints), and dense tactile pressure maps; TouchAnything is the accompanying tactile-estimation framework

resources.name: EgoEverything
resources.scale: 5,000+ MCQ QA pairs over 100+ hours of egocentric video, with questions generated using human attention/gaze signals for AR long-context understanding

resources.name: EgoNight
resources.scale: Nighttime egocentric benchmark: EgoNight-VQA (3,658 QA over 90 videos, 12 QA types) plus day-night correspondence retrieval and egocentric depth estimation, with day-night aligned synthetic and real video

resources.name: EgoIntent
resources.scale: 3,014 steps across 15 indoor/outdoor daily-life scenarios, evaluating local intent (What), global intent (Why), and next-step plan (Next), with future-frame leakage removed

resources.name: EgoMAGIC
resources.scale: 3,355 egocentric field-medicine videos over 50 medical tasks from a head-mounted stereo camera with audio; 1.95M labels for 124 medical objects and an action-detection challenge

resources.name: Audio Hallucination in Egocentric Video
resources.scale: 300 egocentric videos and 1,000 sound-focused questions probing audio hallucination in audio-visual LLMs that infer sounds from visual cues

resources.name: Ego2World
resources.scale: Compiles egocentric cooking videos (built on HD-EPIC) into executable symbolic worlds with graph-transition rules for belief-state planning under partial observability

resources.name: EgoCrowds / CrowdEraser
resources.scale: EgoCrowds: semi-synthetic paired crowded/empty clips from real egocentric walking-tour footage; CrowdEraser is a video-diffusion framework that removes crowds to produce humanless environment walkthroughs

resources.name: EgoPressure
resources.scale: 5.0 hours, 21 participants, a moving egocentric camera plus 7 stationary RGB-D cameras, with hand pose meshes and fine-grained per-contact touch pressure (CVPR 2025)

resources.name: EgoTL
resources.scale: Think-aloud (say-before-act) egocentric capture with word-level spoken reasoning and metric-scale spatial annotations over 100+ household tasks; benchmarks VLMs and world models on six task dimensions

resources.name: SuperMemory-VQA
resources.scale: 52.9 hours of AI-glasses daily activities with RGB, audio transcription, gaze, IMU, and SLAM; 4,853 human-verified QA pairs across object/location memory, intent recall, and scene recall

resources.name: EgoAVU
resources.scale: Scalable audio-visual data engine producing EgoAVU-Instruct (3M QAs) and the human-verified EgoAVU-Bench (3K QAs) for egocentric audio-visual understanding (CVPR 2026 highlight)

resources.name: EgoScale
resources.scale: 20,854 hours of action-labeled egocentric human video for VLA pretraining with a human-to-robot two-stage transfer recipe; reveals a log-linear human-data scaling law

resources.name: StableHand
resources.scale: Quality-aware flow-matching baseline for world-space dual-hand motion estimation from egocentric video, evaluated on HOT3D and ARCTIC

resources.name: EgoVideo
resources.scale: Egocentric video foundation model with a slow-fast adaptation recipe; winner of multiple Ego4D / EPIC-KITCHENS challenge tracks (CVPR 2024 EgoVis)

resources.name: EgoHOD
resources.scale: Fine-grained hand-object-dynamics pretraining (HOD pipeline) for egocentric video representation learning; SOTA on EK-100 retrieval/classification and EGTEA (ICLR 2025)

resources.name: EgoM2P
resources.scale: Egocentric multimodal, multitask pretraining framework over RGB, depth, gaze, and camera pose with a masked modeling objective

resources.name: AlanaVLM
resources.scale: Multimodal embodied-AI foundation model trained for egocentric video understanding with an egocentric video instruction dataset

resources.name: Vinci
resources.scale: Real-time, always-on embodied smart assistant built on an egocentric vision-language model for portable devices, with historical-context QA, task planning, and step-by-step visual demonstrations

resources.name: AMEGO
resources.scale: Active-memory representation from a single long egocentric video, capturing key locations and object interactions for fast multi-query answering; introduces the Active Memories Benchmark (20K+ queries over EPIC-KITCHENS, ECCV 2024)

resources.name: EgoInstructor
resources.scale: Retrieval-augmented egocentric video captioning that retrieves relevant third-person instructional clips, trained with an EgoExoNCE cross-view objective (CVPR 2024)

resources.name: GroundNLQ
resources.scale: Two-stage pretrained multi-scale grounding model for Ego4D Natural Language Queries; champion of the CVPR 2023 Ego4D NLQ challenge

resources.name: OSGNet
resources.scale: Object-shot enhanced grounding network for egocentric video temporal grounding; top entry on Ego4D NLQ / Goal-Step moment queries (CVPR 2025)

resources.name: EgoThinker
resources.scale: Egocentric reasoning model with spatio-temporal chain-of-thought supervision and reinforcement fine-tuning for first-person video understanding

resources.name: Walk through Paintings
resources.scale: Egocentric world models built from internet priors, generating first-person walkthroughs of static scenes such as paintings

resources.name: Temporal-Aware Ego VLM
resources.scale: Training scheme that incentivizes temporal awareness in egocentric video-understanding models, improving order- and timing-sensitive reasoning

resources.name: EgoMotion
resources.scale: Hierarchical reasoning plus diffusion framework for egocentric vision-language motion generation from first-person context

resources.name: Gaze-SoM HOI Anticipation
resources.scale: Leverages gaze and set-of-mark prompting in vision-language LLMs for hand-object-interaction anticipation from egocentric video

resources.name: Sanpo-D
resources.scale: Fine-grained re-annotation of the Sanpo egocentric navigation data with spatial signals, benchmarking spatial-conditioned reasoning of VLMs over long first-person videos

resources.name: EgoSurgery
resources.scale: Egocentric open-surgery video dataset family: EgoSurgery-Phase for surgical phase recognition and EgoSurgery-HTS for pixel-wise hand-tool segmentation of 14 surgical tools (MICCAI 2024)

resources.name: EgoEMS
resources.scale: High-fidelity multimodal egocentric dataset for cognitive assistance in emergency medical services, capturing time-critical team actions in high-stakes scenarios

resources.name: LEMMA
resources.scale: Multi-view multi-agent multi-task daily-activity dataset across 14 kitchens and living rooms, densely annotated with atomic actions and human-object interactions (ECCV 2020)

resources.name: EgoMe
resources.scale: Real-world dataset and challenge for following a demonstrator via egocentric view, pairing exocentric demonstrations with egocentric imitation across everyday tasks

resources.name: ENIGMA-360
resources.scale: Ego-exo dataset for human behavior understanding in industrial scenarios with 360-degree exocentric and egocentric capture

resources.name: EgoIllusion
resources.scale: Benchmark for hallucinations in egocentric video understanding, probing where multimodal models fabricate objects, actions, and sounds

resources.name: EgoExo-Con
resources.scale: Synchronized ego-exo video pairs with human-refined queries for view-invariant temporal verification and grounding; introduces the View-GRPO training framework

resources.name: WearVQA
resources.scale: First wearable-device VQA benchmark for smart glasses: 2,520 image-question-answer triplets across 7 image domains and 10 cognitive task types under occluded, low-light, and blurry egocentric capture (NeurIPS 2025)

resources.name: WearVox
resources.scale: Egocentric multichannel voice-assistant benchmark for wearables, evaluating spoken interaction grounded in first-person audio-visual context

resources.name: SuperGlasses
resources.scale: Benchmark evaluating vision-language models as intelligent agents for AI smart glasses across realistic wearable assistant tasks

resources.name: PhysBrain
resources.scale: Uses human egocentric data as a bridge to adapt vision-language models toward physical intelligence and embodied control

resources.name: EgoCampus
resources.scale: Egocentric pedestrian eye-gaze dataset and model over campus walking routes with synchronized first-person video and gaze

resources.name: Egocentric Clinical Intent
resources.scale: Benchmark for egocentric clinical intent understanding by medical multimodal LLMs over first-person clinical procedure video
